appliedUpdates.description: Added lightweight-charts v5 marker API guidance to `.factory/library/lightweight-charts-v5-markers.md` documenting `createSeriesMarkers(...)` usage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure mission feature `skillName` values are validated against installed skill registry before worker assignment, or provide an explicit fallback policy in orchestrator-generated instructions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature metadata still declares `frontend-ui-worker`, while the worker transcript reports that skill was unavailable and `frontend-trading` was used instead.
